clip_beats: Opening with the main character applying perfume incorrectly: spraying too much on clothes. Show close-up of saturated fabric and explain why this is a mistake.
Escalation showing the character spraying perfume on wrists then rubbing them together, demonstrating the common but wrong habit and its effect on scent alteration.
Payoff demonstrating the correct way to apply perfume: spraying on pulse points without rubbing, with a confident smile and clear visual of balanced scent application.
